title: mentha longifolia var. alpigena
intro: Mentha longifolia var. alpigena, also known as Woolly Mint or Alpine Mint, is a subspecies of the Mint plant (Mentha longifolia) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. alpigena include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating respiratory problems such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Woolly Mint include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions or simply enjoyed for their refreshing and calming properties.
